message:
论文晨报｜微电子材料 / 晶体管（2026-05-22）
Sources: arXiv / Science Advances / Nature Electronics / Nature Materials / IEEE EDL / PRL
命中 2 篇；Intel/TSMC 重点 0 篇
1. [arXiv] High Performance TiO2 Ferroelectric Field Effect Transistors with HfZrO2 for Neuromorphic C…
   关键词：transistor, ferroelectric
   日期：2026-05-20
   Authors: Chandan Samanta, Elia Palmese, Ziyu Ouyang 等
   https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20406v1
2. [arXiv] Towards transistor-based quantum computing
   关键词：transistor
   日期：2026-05-20
   Authors: Y. -D. Liu, X. Xu, Q. -R. Wang 等
   https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21045v1

papers.title: High Performance TiO2 Ferroelectric Field Effect Transistors with HfZrO2 for Neuromorphic Computing
papers.summary: TiO2 ferroelectric field effect transistors (FeFETs) with HfZrO2 (HZO) ferroelectric dielectric layers and bottom gate topology are fabricated for applications in neuromorphic systems. Two sets of devices are fabricated with different gate topologies by varying the thickness of the ferroelectric gate stack. Different device architectures are studied by varying the source drain length (LSD) and gate length (LG). The devices have high on/off ratios up to 10^7 with low leakage off currents <10^-12 A. Repeated cycle testing shows high reliability and a stable memory window. The devices have large memory windows ranging from 3 to 8 V.
papers.abstract_cn: 面向神经形态系统应用，制备了采用 HfZrO2（HZO）铁电介质层和底栅拓扑结构的 TiO2 铁电场效应晶体管（ferroelectric field effect transistors, FeFETs）。通过改变铁电栅堆叠的厚度，制备了两组具有不同栅拓扑结构的器件。通过改变源漏长度（LSD）和栅长（LG），研究了不同的器件架构。器件具有高达 10^7 的高开关比，并且关态漏电流低于 <10^-12 A。重复循环测试显示出高可靠性和稳定的存储窗口。器件具有较大的存储窗口，范围为 3 至 8 V。
papers.reading_notes:
Focus: 晶体管、铁电材料.
What to check: 性能提升、可靠性与稳定性.
Context: High Performance TiO2 Ferroelectric Field Effect Transistors with HfZrO2 for Neuromorphic Compu….

papers.title: An Efficient Approach for Calculating Free Energy in Molecular Dynamics: Demineralization of Hydroxyapatite as a Case Study
papers.summary: Despite the strength of Molecular Dynamics simulations in providing insights into the microscopic details of phenomenon in many fields in materials science, physics and biology, the biggest barrier is its limited timescale which is several orders of magnitude lower than the timescale of the real-world processes and phenomena being modeled. Free energy calculations are designed as a remedy to this problem that in theory can overcome this barrier. This is particularly relevant for biomineralisation processes such as tooth mineral formation and dissolution, while reflecting a broader challenge in accurately modelling rare events and long-timescale phenomena across complex molecular systems. However, due to the novelty of the field, a number of questions remain outstanding pertaining to the best practice of applying this method. The non-equilibrium work approach based on the Jarzynski equation is one of the most promising free energy calculation methods. However, the biggest challenge for the broader use of this method is the question of how many simulations are required for an accurate free energy estimation. Comparing the free energy results with very long reversible pulling simulations of atom clusters from the surface, each taking 75 days on the 48-core Intel Xeon Platinum 8268 CPUs, in this study we showed that this question is irrelevant and higher quality and better equilibrated initial structures is the proper approach than simply based on the number of simulations. We designed a new adaptive free energy calculation methodology which combines high quality, high computational cost free energy values with lower quality, lower cost values to build up the entire free energy profile. In the best case scenario this method lowers manifold the computational cost required for the non-equilibrium work free energy calculations compared to both the regular method and the reversible simulation.
papers.abstract_cn: 尽管分子动力学模拟在材料科学、物理学和生物学等许多领域中能够为现象的微观细节提供洞见，但其最大障碍在于受限的时间尺度，这一时间尺度比所建模的真实世界过程和现象的时间尺度低数个数量级。自由能计算被设计为解决这一问题的补救方法，理论上可以克服这一障碍。这一点对于牙齿矿物形成和溶解等生物矿化过程尤为相关，同时也反映了在复杂分子体系中准确建模稀有事件和长时间尺度现象所面临的更广泛挑战。然而，由于该领域较为新颖，关于应用该方法的最佳实践仍有许多悬而未决的问题。基于 Jarzynski 方程的非平衡功方法是最有前景的自由能计算方法之一。然而，更广泛使用该方法所面临的最大挑战在于：为了准确估算自由能，需要进行多少次模拟。通过将自由能结果与从表面拉出原子簇的极长可逆拉伸模拟进行比较——每次模拟在 48 核 Intel Xeon Platinum 8268 CPU 上耗时 75 天——本研究表明，这个问题本身并不关键；相比于仅仅依据模拟次数，采用质量更高且平衡更充分的初始结构才是更合适的方法。我们设计了一种新的自适应自由能计算方法，该方法将高质量、高计算成本的自由能数值与较低质量、较低成本的数值相结合，以构建完整的自由能剖面。在最佳情况下，与常规方法和可逆模拟相比，该方法可成倍降低非平衡功自由能计算所需的计算成本。
papers.reading_notes:
Focus: 微电子器件与材料.
What to check: 功耗或能效表现.
Context: An Efficient Approach for Calculating Free Energy in Molecular Dynamics: Demineralization of Hy….

papers.title: High-performance p-type monolayer tungsten diselenide transistors
papers.summary: Nature Electronics, Published online: 20 May 2026; doi:10.1038/s41928-026-01637-w Using an industry-compatible and tunable oxygen-incorporated technique to heal defect states, p-type monolayer tungsten diselenide transistors can be created with a hole mobility of 137 cm2 V−1 s−1 and a contact resistance of approximately 560 Ω µm at room temperature.
papers.abstract_cn: 《Nature Electronics》，在线发表：2026年5月20日；doi:10.1038/s41928-026-01637-w。利用一种工业兼容且可调的氧引入技术来修复缺陷态，可以制备 p 型单层二硒化钨晶体管，其在室温下具有 137 cm2 V−1 s−1 的空穴迁移率和约 560 Ω µm 的接触电阻。
papers.reading_notes:
Focus: 晶体管.
What to check: 性能提升、接触/互连相关指标、与既有工艺平台的集成价值.
Context: High-performance p-type monolayer tungsten diselenide transistors.

papers.title: Towards transistor-based quantum computing
papers.summary: In this work, we propose and study in depth a universal quantum computing architecture based on a quantum construction of transistors. Our teleportation-based quantum transistors, called ``telesistors'', are ground states of systems with symmetry-protected topological order, hence suppress certain noises and provide high-fidelity Clifford gates without the need for active error correction. This physical protection, quantified by the string order parameters, serves as a low-overhead foundation upon which conventional fault-tolerant encoding (e.g., with stabilizer codes) can be built to achieve universal quantum computation. This architecture shows rich connections with current known architectures, and some desirable merits especially compared with the qubit-based circuits regarding modularity, integration, and program storage. Our study shows that it is plausible to realize it with current technology in the near future.
papers.abstract_cn: 在本工作中，我们提出并深入研究了一种基于晶体管量子构造的通用量子计算架构。我们基于量子隐形传态的量子晶体管称为“telesistors”，它们是具有对称性保护拓扑序的系统基态，因此能够抑制某些噪声，并在不需要主动纠错的情况下提供高保真 Clifford 门。这种由弦序参量量化的物理保护，构成了一个低开销基础，可在其上构建传统容错编码（例如使用稳定子码）以实现通用量子计算。该架构与当前已知架构具有丰富联系，并且相较于基于量子比特的电路，在模块化、集成和程序存储方面具有一些理想优点。我们的研究表明，在不久的将来利用现有技术实现该架构是可行的。
papers.reading_notes:
Focus: 晶体管.
What to check: 与既有工艺平台的集成价值.
Context: Towards transistor-based quantum computing.

papers.title: Berry-phase in a periodically driven single molecule magnet transistor
papers.summary: We consider the electron transport through a single molecule magnet transistor in the presence of a local transverse magnetic field and ac-driven gate voltage. We calculate the conductance as a function of the electron energy and transverse magnetic field by using the Floquet and Landauer formalism. We show that the time periodic potential causes zero transmission resonances that oscillate as a function of the transverse magnetic field due to the Berry phase interference associated with two quantum tunneling paths. We find that these Berry phase oscillations can be detected in the conductance as a function of the transverse magnetic field for an incoming electron with a specific energy.
papers.abstract_cn: 我们考虑了在局域横向磁场和交流驱动栅电压存在下，电子通过单分子磁体晶体管的输运。我们利用 Floquet 和 Landauer 形式体系，计算了电导随电子能量和横向磁场的变化。我们表明，时间周期性势会导致零透射共振；由于与两条量子隧穿路径相关的 Berry 相位干涉，这些共振会随横向磁场发生振荡。我们发现，对于具有特定能量的入射电子，可以在电导随横向磁场的变化中探测到这些 Berry 相位振荡。
papers.reading_notes:
Focus: 晶体管.
What to check: 功耗或能效表现.
Context: Berry-phase in a periodically driven single molecule magnet transistor.

papers.title: Non-volatile memories based on patterned metal–semiconductor heterostructures of niobium disulfide and molybdenum disulfide
papers.summary: Nature Electronics, Published online: 19 May 2026; doi:10.1038/s41928-026-01634-z Patterned and scalable two-dimensional metal–semiconductor heterostructures formed between niobium disulfide and molybdenum disulfide can be created using an in situ sulfurization process and used to make field-effect transistors and non-volatile memory devices.
papers.abstract_cn: 《Nature Electronics》，在线发表：2026年5月19日；doi:10.1038/s41928-026-01634-z。可图案化且可扩展的二维金属—半导体异质结构可通过原位硫化工艺在二硫化铌和二硫化钼之间形成，并可用于制备场效应晶体管和非易失性存储器件。
papers.reading_notes:
Focus: 半导体.
What to check: 器件性能、实验结果和潜在应用价值.
Context: Non-volatile memories based on patterned metal–semiconductor heterostructures of niobium disulf….

papers.title: Probing individual quantum emitters in bulk semiconductors via photonic nanojets
papers.summary: Solid-state quantum emitters serve as fundamental building blocks for quantum information processing, quantum telecommunication, and quantum-enhanced sensing, particularly at the nanoscale. However, the high refractive index of the emitters’ host materials often result in low-efficiency collection of the photons generated by the emitters. In addition, isolating individual quantum emitters generally requires high-purity samples and precise defect implantation, adding to the fabrication complexity. In this work, we use free-form topology optimization to design broadband monolithic photonic structures within high–refractive index materials hosting a relatively dense ensemble of randomly distributed quantum emitters. Fabricated via standard top-down patterning techniques, these inverse-designed nanostructures generate tightly confined photonic nanojets, which in turn enable selective excitation of individual emitters and improve photon extraction efficiency. The optimized geometries also substantially suppress background photoluminescence from near-surface optically active defects and from randomly distributed emitters in the bulk, boosting the signal-to-noise ratio. We demonstrate this paradigm using negatively charged nitrogen vacancy (NV − ) centers in a low-cost diamond sample at room temperature as a case study, achieving selective single emitter excitation with a 10-fold power enhancement and more than 15-fold improvement in the photon extraction efficiency of photoluminescence collection in confocal microscopy. Beyond NV centers and other diamond-embedded quantum emitters, the use of inverse-designed structures generating subwavelength photonic nanojets is applicable to other semiconductor materials containing emitters and can be seamlessly generalized to fiber-integrated platforms.
papers.abstract_cn: 固态量子发射体是量子信息处理、量子通信和量子增强传感的基本构件，尤其是在纳米尺度上。然而，发射体宿主材料的高折射率通常会导致对发射体所产生光子的收集效率较低。此外，分离单个量子发射体通常需要高纯度样品和精确的缺陷注入，从而增加了制造复杂性。在本工作中，我们利用自由形态拓扑优化，在含有相对高密度随机分布量子发射体集合的高折射率材料中设计宽带单片光子结构。这些反向设计的纳米结构通过标准自上而下图形化技术制备，可产生强限域的光子纳米喷流，从而实现对单个发射体的选择性激发，并提高光子提取效率。优化后的几何结构还显著抑制来自近表面光学活性缺陷以及体内随机分布发射体的背景光致发光，从而提升信噪比。我们以低成本金刚石样品中的负电荷氮—空位（NV−）中心为案例，在室温下展示了这一范式，实现了选择性单发射体激发，并获得 10 倍功率增强；同时，在共焦显微镜的光致发光收集中，光子提取效率提高超过 15 倍。除 NV 中心和其他嵌入金刚石的量子发射体之外，利用反向设计结构产生亚波长光子纳米喷流的方法也适用于其他含有发射体的半导体材料，并且可以无缝推广到光纤集成平台。
papers.reading_notes:
Focus: 半导体.
What to check: 性能提升、效率/耦合表现.
Context: Probing individual quantum emitters in bulk semiconductors via photonic nanojets.

papers.title: Transconductance as a Probe of Valley Thermodynamics in Multilayer WSe$_2$
papers.summary: Transconductance is a central figure of merit in field-effect transistors, typically governed by charge accumulation and carrier mobility. In multilayer WSe$_2$ transistors, however, it is shown to carry a nonlinear transport signature of inter-valley carrier redistribution between the $K$ and $Γ$ valleys. This valley-crossover contribution suppresses transconductance in bilayer WSe$_2$ and reverses sign in trilayer, while remaining absent in single-valley systems. Unlike extrinsic mechanisms such as trap-state filling or contact resistance, the anomaly leaves the subthreshold swing unchanged and cannot be reproduced within conventional single-valley transport models. Introducing the valley susceptibility $χ_v \equiv \partial f_Γ/\partial V_{\rm GS}$, bounded by an intrinsic thermodynamic limit $(4k_BT)^{-1}$, we quantify this response and show that it reaches ${\sim}0.20\,\mathrm{V}^{-1}$ in bilayer WSe$_2$ near threshold at room temperature. The sign, magnitude, and temperature dependence of the anomaly provide directly measurable fingerprints of valley thermodynamics, establishing transconductance as an electrical probe of internal electronic degrees of freedom and revealing a previously hidden nonlinear response in standard transistor measurements.
papers.abstract_cn: 跨导是场效应晶体管中的核心品质因数，通常由电荷积累和载流子迁移率决定。然而，在多层 WSe$_2$ 晶体管中，跨导被证明携带了 $K$ 谷和 $Γ$ 谷之间谷间载流子重新分布的非线性输运特征。这种谷转换贡献会抑制双层 WSe$_2$ 中的跨导，并在三层中反转符号，而在单谷体系中不存在。不同于陷阱态填充或接触电阻等外源机制，这一异常不会改变亚阈值摆幅，并且无法在传统单谷输运模型中再现。通过引入谷易感性 χ_v ≡ ∂f_Γ/∂V_GS，并考虑其受内禀热力学极限 (4k_BT)^−1 约束，我们量化了这一响应，并表明其在室温下双层 WSe$_2$ 的阈值附近达到约 0.20 V−1。该异常的符号、幅值和温度依赖性提供了可直接测量的谷热力学指纹，确立了跨导作为内部电子自由度电学探针的作用，并揭示了标准晶体管测量中此前隐藏的非线性响应。
papers.reading_notes:
Focus: 微电子器件与材料.
What to check: 接触/互连相关指标.
Context: Transconductance as a Probe of Valley Thermodynamics in Multilayer WSe$_2$.
